text:
The real paper at the cited URL (S0021929024005189) has the title **"LiDAR-based scaling of OpenSim musculoskeletal human models is a viable alternative to marker-based approaches — A preliminary study"**, authored by Grace McConnochie et al. (not Zoran Vasic et al.). The cited title ("…is accurate and efficient—a validation study using 3d body scanning") does not match, the cited authors do not match, and no paper with the exact cited title was found anywhere.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The URL provided points to a real paper titled "LiDAR-based scaling of OpenSim musculoskeletal human models is a viable alternative to marker-based approaches — A preliminary study" by McConnochie et al., not Vasic et al. The cited title and authors are both incorrect, indicating a hallucinated reference grafted onto a real URL.
LINK: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0021929024005189
